Home/Services/Eyebrows
✦

Permanent Eyebrows

Perfect brows. Every single morning.

Book This ServiceView Results

About This Treatment

Achieve perfectly shaped brows every day with permanent eyebrows for a polished look. Each technique is customised to your facial structure, hair colour, and lifestyle for results that look completely natural.

Techniques Available

Which Technique Is Right for You?

Microblading

Fine hair-stroke technique using a manual blade to create ultra-realistic, natural-looking brow hairs. Best for normal to dry skin types.

2–3 hours
Lasts 12–18 months

Ombre Brows

A soft, powdery brow effect that starts lighter at the front and gradually deepens towards the tail. Works beautifully on all skin types.

2–3 hours
Lasts 1–2 years

Powder Brows

A filled, polished brow look that mimics the appearance of perfectly applied brow powder. Ideal for oily skin types.

2–3 hours
Lasts 1–3 years

Combination Brows

The best of both worlds — fine hair strokes at the front with a soft ombre shading towards the tail for a full, dimensional look.

2.5–3 hours
Lasts 1–2 years

Nano Brows

Machine hair-stroke technique creating the finest, most precise individual hairs. Suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin.

2–3 hours
Lasts 1–2 years

Real Results
